# Baby Steps – Newborn & Child Clinic

Premium pediatric and newborn care clinic located in Neelbad, Bhopal. Guided by senior consultants with international credentials and WHO-compliant vaccine facilities.

## Doctors & Care Team
* **Dr. Sudarshan Dev Arya** (Senior Pediatrician & Newborn Specialist)
  * Qualifications: MBBS, DCH, DNB (New Delhi), PGPN (Boston, USA)
  * Affiliation: Consultant, Rainbow Children's Hospital, Bhopal
* **Dr. Manisha Bangarwa Arya** (Senior Neonatologist & Pediatrician)
  * Qualifications: MBBS, DNB (New Delhi), PGPN (Boston, USA), Fellowship in Neonatology
  * Affiliation: Consultant, Apollo SAGE Hospital, Bhopal

## Specialized Clinical Services
* **Vaccination Clinic**: On-schedule, WHO-compliant cold-chain vaccine administration.
* **Newborn Care**: Triage guidance, neonatal support, breastfeeding counseling, and post-discharge NICU checks.
* **NICU Follow-up**: Specialized medical follow-up for high-risk babies.
* **Growth & Milestone Tracking**: Tracking height, weight, and cognitive development.
* **Child Nutrition**: Personalized healthy eating charts and guidance.
* **Development Assessment**: Developmental delay screenings and support.
* **Breastfeeding Counseling**: Professional guidance for latching and nutrition.
* **Fever Management**: Quick diagnostics for pediatric fevers and infections.
* **Allergy & Asthma Care**: Long-term management of breathing concerns and allergies.
* **Adolescent Health**: Healthcare support for puberty and teenage concerns.
* **Emergency Child Care**: Direct medical triage instructions during clinic hours.
* **Parent Education**: Supportive guidance for first-time parents.

## Location & NAP
* **Name**: Baby Steps – Newborn & Child Clinic
* **Address**: 227/1, Near Durga Mata Mandir, Pooja Colony, Neelbad, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462044
* **Phone**: +91 62625 60101 (Mobile) / 0755-4565588 (Landline)
* **Email**: contact@babystepsnewbornclinic.com
* **Map Listing**: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Baby+Steps+Newborn+%26+Child+Clinic/@23.1967373,77.3504045,17z

## Consultation Hours
* **Monday to Saturday**: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM (10:00 AM – 1:00 PM & 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM recommended)
* **Sunday**: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM (Closed for routine visits; open for urgent consultations)
